home.title: ViiLa Munte Toplița - Wooden Cabin for 20 Guests in the Călimani Mountains
home.description: ViiLa Munte Toplița - Exclusive wooden cabin rental for up to 20 guests in the Călimani Mountains. Private rental, billiards, sauna, hot tub and Starlink internet. Perfect for teambuilding and private events.

cabin.title: Accommodation for 20 People Toplița - Rooms & Amenities at Viila Munte
cabin.description: Discover Viila Munte, the ideal teambuilding venue in Harghita. Mountain cabin in Călimani with 20 spots, 7 bathrooms, hot tub and sauna. Book the whole place!

access.title: How to Get to ViiLa Munte - Forest Road & Toplița Attractions
access.description: Complete guide on how to reach ViiLa Munte Toplița. The 12km forest road through Călimani and top attractions: Mezothermal Waterfall and Ski Slopes.

teambuilding.title: Teambuilding in Harghita - Exclusive Venue in the Călimani Mountains
teambuilding.description: ViiLa Munte: The ideal mountain teambuilding destination. 20-person capacity, Starlink internet, total privacy and premium amenities in the heart of Călimani.

booking.title: Book ViiLa Munte Toplița — Availability and Rates
booking.description: Book the entire ViiLa Munte cabin for your group of 20. Rate: 2,400 RON/night. Check the updated calendar and house rules.

hero.title: ViiLa Munte — Your Exclusive Retreat in the Heart of Călimani
hero.tagline: 12 km of silence between you and the rest of the world. Full cabin rental for groups of up to 20 people.

intro.title: Say Goodbye to the City, Say Hello to the Mountains
intro.text: ViiLa Munte is a total disconnection experience at 1,000m altitude. An isolated location, designed specifically for teambuilding and large groups seeking absolute privacy and premium comfort.

spa.title: Fire, Water and Relaxation under the Open Sky
spa.text: Discover our hot tub and panoramic sauna, specially crafted to wash away the day's fatigue under the clearest starlit sky.

teambuilding.title: The ideal location for your team
teambuilding.text: Total privacy, fast internet and generous space for group activities. No neighbours, no distractions.

outdoor.title: Mountain flavours and evenings by the campfire
outdoor.text: We have everything ready for a true feast: a fully equipped BBQ and cauldron area, a covered gazebo, and a special spot for campfires under the open Călimani sky.

road.title: The journey is part of the adventure
road.text: The last 12 km are on a forest road — the natural barrier that separates us from the noise of civilisation.

social.title: Our guests recommend us
social.text: We are proud of our community. With over 79 positive reviews on Google Maps, ViiLa Munte is one of the most appreciated mountain locations in Harghita County. People come for the scenery and return for the hospitality.

hero.title: Comfort and Privacy in the Heart of the Călimani Mountains
hero.subtitle: A mountain cabin where generous space meets complete serenity. Ideal configuration for groups and teambuilding sessions of 20 people.

rooms.title: Rest under the mountain sky
rooms.subtitle: Four room types, each designed for maximum comfort in the heart of nature.
rooms.apt: Apartment · 2 bedrooms, double beds, shared bathroom · ×1 unit
rooms.double: Double room · double bed, private bathroom · ×2 units
rooms.triple: Triple room · double + single bed, private bathroom · ×2 units
rooms.mansard: Mansard room · double + single bed, private bathroom · ×2 units

kitchen.title: A fully equipped kitchen for large feasts
kitchen.text: We know that a great meal means a happy team. Our kitchen is ready to support the needs of a group of 20 people, equipped with:

common.title: Facilities for groups and entertainment
common.text: If you are looking for a cabin in Toplița where fun has no limits, Viila Munte offers a generous living room with a billiard table, a dining area for 20 people and a fully equipped kitchen for memorable feasts. No neighbours, no volume restrictions, just your team.

spa.title: Premium Relaxation: Hot Tub & Sauna
spa.text: No experience at a cabin in Călimani is complete without the hot water ritual.
spa.tub: Outdoor Hot Tub: Relaxation under the stars (450 RON / night).
spa.sauna: Panoramic Sauna: Direct view of the forest (250 RON / night).

outdoor.title: Cook and relax under the open sky
outdoor.text: A mountain cabin is not complete without the smell of embers and stories by the fire. Viila Munte provides everything you need for an authentic feast:
outdoor.bbq: BBQ and cauldron area: Fully equipped for delicious outdoor cooking.
outdoor.campfire: Campfire: The specially arranged spot where teambuilding evenings become unforgettable under the starlit Călimani sky.
outdoor.gazebo: Gazebo: Covered outdoor dining space, whatever the weather.

tech.title: Connectivity at altitude
tech.text: Although we are an isolated mountain cabin, you stay connected through high-speed Starlink internet. Ideal for working sessions during a teambuilding or uninterrupted video streaming.

cta.title: Ready to book the entire cabin?

hero.title: The Road to Silence: Access Guide
hero.subtitle: A 12 km journey through the heart of the forest — your gateway to total disconnection.

road.title: What you need to know about the forest road
road.text: ViiLa Munte is an isolated location, and the road to us is part of the charm of the experience. Access is from the town of Toplița on a 12 km forest road.
road.accessible: Is it passable? Yes, the road is accessible for any type of passenger car driven with care. You don't need a 4x4 vehicle — just patience to savour the scenery (estimated travel time: 45-60 minutes).
road.signal: GSM Signal: Once on the forest road, the phone signal will gradually disappear. We recommend saving the route offline. At the cabin, you will enjoy a stable connection through Starlink internet.

shopping.title: Last stop for shopping
shopping.text: As a location situated deep in the mountains, we recommend doing all necessary shopping in Toplița before setting off on the forest road. In town you will find supermarkets (Lidl, Penny) and local producers for full supplies.

attractions.title: What you can visit in the area

0.name: Toplița Mezothermal Waterfall
0.desc: A unique wonder in Romania where the water never freezes. (12 km from the cabin).

1.name: Lake Iezer Retițiș
1.desc: Explore the Călimani Mountains directly from the cabin's doorstep. A spectacular mountain trail leading to the glacial lake at 2,021m altitude.

2.name: Lomășița Waterfall
2.desc: A hidden gem of the mountains, perfect for a wilderness hiking excursion. A scenic forest trail accessible to mountain lovers.

3.name: Ski Slope & Wellness Centre
3.desc: Snowy fun in winter or relaxation at the mezothermal pool in Toplița during the rest of the year.

4.name: Călimani Reserve
4.desc: Spectacular mountain trails and wild landscapes, right at the cabin's doorstep.

hero.title: Your office at 1,000m altitude: Teambuilding without compromise
hero.subtitle: Total privacy, satellite connectivity and unlimited space for your team. The location where ideas come to life in the silence of the mountains.

features.title: Facilities dedicated to your team's success

0.title: Starlink Connectivity
0.text: High-speed satellite internet (Wi-Fi 6), stable for video conferencing or remote work.

1.title: 100% Privacy
1.text: The cabin is rented in its entirety. We have no neighbours, so the team can enjoy complete freedom, without restrictions.

2.title: Capacity of 20 people
2.text: 8 accommodation units ready to ensure the comfort and rest of every team member.

3.title: Company invoicing
3.text: We provide the fiscal documents necessary for simple and fast corporate event reimbursement.

activities.title: Activities that bond the team
activities.text: We know that the best ideas come in moments of relaxation. After brainstorming sessions in the generous living room, the team can move to:
activities.0: Billiards competitions in the entertainment area.
activities.1: An evening of stories at the campfire under the open sky.
activities.2: Relaxation at the hot tub and sauna to recharge.
activities.3: Exploratory hikes to Lake Iezer or the local waterfalls.

gallery.title: The venue atmosphere
gallery.subtitle: A glimpse of the spaces that make the difference for your team.

dining.title: Everything at your disposal
dining.text: The fully equipped kitchen allows you to organise your meals exactly as you wish, from fresh morning coffee (bean-to-cup machine included), to BBQs and outdoor cauldrons. You have total organisational freedom.

cta.title: Want to book the next teambuilding in Călimani?

hero.title: Book your retreat in the heart of the mountains
hero.subtitle: Check availability and prepare for an unforgettable experience with your group. Full cabin rental for a maximum of 20 people.

rates.title: Rates and services
rates.included: Included in price: Billiard table, BBQ/cauldron, campfire (firewood included), Starlink internet, parking.

calendar.title: Check available dates
calendar.comingSoonSub: We are working on an online booking calendar. In the meantime, check availability via WhatsApp or the form below.
calendar.error: Could not load availability. Please contact us directly.

rules.title: Rules and administrative details
rules.smoking: Smoking strictly forbidden inside the cabin (allowed on terraces and outdoor areas).
rules.noise: As we have no neighbours, you can enjoy music at any volume, with respect for the peace of nature.
rules.access: Please note that the last 12 km are on a forest road. We recommend full provisioning in the town of Toplița.
rules.pets: Pet policy: Contact us for details.

contact.location: Toplița, Harghita County (Access from Str. Măgheruș).

form.subtitle: Fill in the details below and we will contact you as soon as possible for confirmation.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro:
The website viilamunte.ro is owned and operated by Sc Pro-Silva HR SRL ("ViLaMunte", "we"). Sc Pro-Silva HR SRL is based in Toplita, is registered with the Trade Register under no. J19/46/2009 and has tax identification number RO24982271.

By "viilamunte.ro" we mean any web page (website, landing page, subdomain) owned, administered or operated by Sc Pro-Silva HR SRL. During browsing on the Site, terms such as "we" or "our" refer to the aforementioned company.

viilamunte.ro includes online information for users who accept the terms and conditions below, as well as any additional policies available on the site.

By visiting and using our online platform, you undertake to comply with these Terms and Conditions and the associated policies mentioned on the site. These Terms and Conditions apply to all users, including visitors who browse, submit requests or download materials.

Please read these Terms and Conditions before using the website. By accessing or using any part of the website, you confirm that you accept the provisions. If you do not accept the terms, please stop using the website and do not use the available forms or materials.

Any new feature or section added to the website will be subject to these Terms and Conditions. We reserve the right to update, modify or replace any part of these Terms and Conditions by publishing the updated version on this page. It is your responsibility to check this page periodically. Continued use of the website after the changes are published constitutes acceptance of those changes.

c2.title: Chapter II. Terms and Definitions
c2.text:
Online Platform / Site: Refers to viilamunte.ro and the associated pages administered by Sc Pro-Silva HR SRL.

Owner: Sc Pro-Silva HR SRL, based in Toplita, registered with the Trade Register under no. J19/46/2009, tax ID RO24982271.

User: A natural or legal person while using the website.

Submission: Transmission of data by the User through the website, for example by completing a contact form, subscribing to a newsletter or downloading a resource.

Link: A link to an internal or external page accessed by click.

Services: The services presented on the website, including accommodation, teambuilding packages and related services.

c3.title: Chapter III. Intellectual Property Rights
c3.text:
The content of the website viilamunte.ro, including texts, images, graphic elements, downloadable materials, scripts, page structures, code and visual identity elements, constitutes the property of viilamunte.ro or is used lawfully with the right of use. Use of any elements without written consent is prohibited and may give rise to liability under applicable law.

We may grant the User the right to use certain materials through a separate agreement or through conditions explicitly stated at the time the material is provided. This right is limited to the purpose, period and person indicated and does not confer rights over other elements of the website.

The use on the website of any trademarks or logos belonging to third parties is for informational purposes and does not imply affiliation, sponsorship or endorsement in the absence of an express statement.

If you notice a possible copyright infringement in the website content, please contact us at viilamunte@gmail.com.

c4.title: Chapter IV. General Conditions of Use
c4.text:
By using the website you confirm that you are at least 18 years old and have the legal capacity to enter into legal acts. The website is not intended for minors and we do not intentionally collect data from persons under 18.

The website content is informational in nature. No part of the content constitutes a firm and binding offer to contract services. Any collaboration is established by accepting an offer, a contract or a written agreement, as applicable.

We make reasonable efforts to keep the information up to date, but typographical errors, inaccuracies or omissions may occur. We may correct the content and update the information at any time.

It is forbidden to use the website to transmit malicious code, attempt unauthorized access, spam, unauthorized data collection or any action that may affect the operation of the website or cause damage.

We may limit or stop access to the website, in whole or in part, in the event of a breach of these Terms and Conditions or when we reasonably believe it is necessary for the security of the platform.

c5.title: Chapter V. Services, Estimates and Results
c5.text:
The services presented on the website include accommodation, teambuilding packages, SPA services and related offerings. The exact details of deliverables, deadlines and commercial terms are established through direct communication and booking confirmation.

Any estimates, projections or examples of results are indicative. We do not guarantee specific outcomes in the absence of an express written confirmation.

Advertising budgets and third-party platform policies are outside our control.

c6.title: Chapter VI. Personal Data Processing
c6.text:
We respect the confidentiality of website users. The website can be visited without providing personal data. Data are processed when the User submits information through forms, subscribes to the newsletter, downloads materials or contacts us through the available channels.

For details regarding categories of data, purposes and rights, please consult the Privacy Policy available on the website.

c7.title: Chapter VII. Use of Cookies
c7.text: viilamunte.ro uses cookies and similar technologies. For details on categories, consent and management, please consult the Cookie Policy available on the website.

c8.title: Chapter VIII. Data and Platform Security
c8.text: We apply technical and organizational measures to secure the website and protect data. However, no online platform can guarantee absolute security. The User assumes responsibility for the data they choose to transmit and for the security of their own device. In the event of a security breach affecting personal data, we will notify the affected users in accordance with the applicable legal provisions.

c9.title: Chapter IX. Third-Party Links
c9.text: The website may include links to sites operated by third parties. These links are for informational purposes. We do not control the content or policies of those sites and do not assume responsibility for their use. We recommend consulting the terms and policies of those websites.

c10.title: Chapter X. Errors, Inaccuracies and Omissions
c10.text: Occasionally, website content may include typographical errors, inaccuracies or omissions. We reserve the right to correct these situations and update the content without prior notice where necessary.

c11.title: Chapter XI. Prohibited Uses
c11.text:
The website may not be used for: any illegal action or action that infringes third-party rights; infringement of intellectual property rights; harassment, intimidation, defamation or discrimination; transmitting false or misleading information or impersonating another person; transmitting viruses, malware or destructive code; unauthorized collection or monitoring of other users' data; unauthorized access attempts, vulnerability testing or attacks on security systems; automated or abusive use of the website that exceeds normal and reasonable browsing.

We reserve the right to restrict access, including by blocking IP addresses, when we identify behavior that may affect the operation of the website or its security.

c12.title: Chapter XII. Disclaimer of Warranties; Limitation of Liability
c12.text:
The website and its content are provided for informational purposes. We do not guarantee that the website will operate without interruptions or errors and we are not liable for indirect damages resulting from the use or inability to use the website, to the extent permitted by law.

We are not responsible for the effects generated by decisions made solely on the basis of the information published on the website, in the absence of a contract or written confirmation regarding applicability in the specific case.

c13.title: Chapter XIII. Termination of Use
c13.text: You may stop using the website at any time by ceasing to access our pages. If we believe that you have breached these Terms and Conditions or if there are reasonable suspicions of a breach, we may suspend or stop access to the website without prior notice.

c14.title: Chapter XIV. Dispute Resolution. Governing Law
c14.text:
Any attempt at unauthorized access or fraud will be reported to the competent authorities. Any conflict between Sc Pro-Silva HR SRL and the User will be attempted to be resolved amicably. Please send us any complaint at viilamunte@gmail.com so we can try to resolve it quickly.

If amicable settlement is not possible, Romanian law applies and the competent courts are those in Romania.

c15.title: Chapter XV. Contact Information
c15.text: Questions, suggestions and complaints related to these Terms and Conditions or associated policies may be sent to viilamunte@gmail.com or to phone number +40 740 618 773.

c16.title: Chapter XVI. Final Provisions
c16.text: If any of the above clauses is found to be null or invalid, this will not affect the validity of the remaining clauses.

c1.title: Chapter I. General Overview
c1.text:
The website viilamunte.ro is owned and operated by Sc Pro-Silva HR SRL ("ViLaMunte", "we"). Sc Pro-Silva HR SRL is based in Toplita, is registered with the Trade Register under no. J19/46/2009 and has tax identification number RO24982271.

By "viilamunte.ro" we mean any web page (website, landing page, subdomain) owned, administered or operated by Sc Pro-Silva HR SRL.

This Privacy Policy describes how we collect and process personal data when you use the website, complete forms, download materials, subscribe to the newsletter or interact with us through the contact channels displayed.

By using the website, you confirm that you have read and understood this Privacy Policy. If you do not agree with the provisions below, please do not use the forms and do not provide personal data through the website.

c2.title: Chapter II. Terms and Definitions
c2.text:
Online Platform / Site: Refers to viilamunte.ro and the associated pages administered by Sc Pro-Silva HR SRL.

Controller: Sc Pro-Silva HR SRL, Toplita, J19/46/2009, RO24982271.

User: An individual or legal entity using the website.

Personal Data: Any information that can directly or indirectly identify a person, such as name, email, phone number and the content of messages sent.

Submission: Transmission of data by the User through the website, for example by completing a contact form, subscribing to a newsletter or downloading a resource.

Processor: A contractual partner that processes data on behalf of the Controller, under an agreement.

c3.title: Chapter III. Contact Details
c3.text:
For questions or requests regarding personal data, you can contact us as follows:

Email: viilamunte@gmail.com

Phone: +40 740 618 773

We do not have a designated Data Protection Officer (DPO). We handle personal-data requests through the email address above.

c4.title: Chapter IV. What Data We Collect
c4.text:
We may collect the following categories of data depending on how you use the website: full name, email address, phone number, message and information included in free-text fields, answers to questions in forms, questionnaires or quizzes, data provided for newsletter subscription, and data provided to access or download materials (lead magnets).

We do not carry out automated profiling and we do not make decisions solely by automated means that produce legal or similarly significant effects on Users.

c5.title: Chapter V. Purposes of Processing and Legal Bases
c5.text:
We process personal data for the following purposes: responding to requests and discussions initiated through forms or direct contact, making offers and pre-contractual steps, sending communications by newsletter, providing requested materials via download, measuring website performance and improving the user experience, and measuring conversions and optimizing marketing campaigns.

The legal bases for these purposes are: performance of pre-contractual steps for offer requests and discussions initiated through forms; consent for sending marketing communications (newsletter), downloading materials (lead magnets) and activating tracking tools (pixels/cookies); and legitimate interest for measuring website performance, optimizing campaigns and securing the platform.

c6.title: Chapter VI. Tools Used and Technical Data
c6.text:
The website may use measurement and marketing tools implemented through Google Tag Manager. Depending on the consent given in the cookie banner, we may activate Google Analytics for traffic and performance analysis, Google Ads for conversion measurement and campaign optimization, and Meta Ads through Meta Business Manager for conversion measurement and campaign optimization.

In practice, analytics services may process the IP address transiently for technical functions such as security and location estimation. We do not use this data for identification and we do not track the IP address as an identifying element in our reports.

c7.title: Chapter VII. Recipients, Processors and Transfers
c7.text:
Data may be processed by the hosting provider Hostico, Google Workspace, Google Tag Manager, Google Analytics, Google Ads, Meta Business Manager, as well as collaborators and contractual partners, including freelancers, when this is necessary for service delivery.

Where certain providers are located outside the European Economic Area, transfers may take place under GDPR-permitted conditions, including Standard Contractual Clauses and additional measures where applicable. We do not sell personal data and we do not transfer it to third parties for commercial purposes independent of our services.

When using analytics and advertising services, certain data may be transferred to or accessed by the parent entities of Google and Meta located in the United States. These transfers take place under the EU-U.S. Data Privacy Framework (for certified organizations) or under the Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) approved by the European Commission, ensuring a level of protection equivalent to that in the European Union.

c8.title: Chapter VIII. Retention Period
c8.text:
We retain data collected through contact forms for up to 1 year in the case of requests that do not result in a contract. Data provided for newsletter subscription or downloading materials (lead magnets) is retained for 3 years from the last interaction, or until consent is withdrawn.

Consent can be withdrawn at any time using the unsubscribe option included in communications or by sending a request to viilamunte@gmail.com.

c9.title: Chapter IX. Data Subject Rights
c9.text:
Under the GDPR, you have the following rights: the right of access, the right to rectification, the right to erasure, the right to restriction of processing, the right to object, the right to data portability, the right to withdraw consent where processing is based on consent, and the right to lodge a complaint with the competent authority.

To exercise your rights, you can write to viilamunte@gmail.com. We may request additional information to confirm identity when necessary.

c10.title: Chapter X. Minors
c10.text: The website and the services presented are not intended for minors. We do not intentionally collect data from persons under 18 years of age. If you suspect that we have received such data, please contact us for deletion.

c11.title: Chapter XI. Cookies and Consent
c11.text:
The website uses cookies and similar technologies. Consent management is handled through the cookie banner. Optional cookies, such as analytics and marketing cookies, are activated based on the choices expressed by the User.

For details about categories and how they are managed, please consult the Cookie Policy available on the website.

c12.title: Chapter XII. Data Security
c12.text:
We apply technical and organizational measures to protect data, including access control, role separation, server-level protection and the use of secure communication channels.

Submitting information through forms involves the voluntary provision of data by the User. We recommend that you do not submit sensitive information that is not necessary for assessing the request.

c13.title: Chapter XIII. Third-Party Links
c13.text: The website may contain links to websites operated by third parties. We do not control their content or policies, and their use is at your own risk. We recommend reviewing the privacy policies of those websites.

c14.title: Chapter XIV. Policy Updates
c14.text: We may update this Privacy Policy when changes occur in our activity, in the tools we use, or in legal requirements. The updated version will be published on this page.

c15.title: Chapter XV. Contact Information
c15.text: Questions, suggestions and requests regarding this policy can be sent to viilamunte@gmail.com or to phone number +40 740 618 773.

c16.title: Chapter XVI. Final Provisions
c16.text: If any of the above clauses is found to be null or invalid, this will not affect the validity of the remaining clauses.

s1.title: 1. What are cookies?
s1.text:
An "internet cookie" (also known as a "browser cookie", "HTTP cookie" or simply "cookie") is a small file containing letters and numbers that is stored on your computer, mobile device or other equipment through which you access the internet.

Cookies are installed through a request sent by a web server to a browser (e.g. Internet Explorer, Firefox, Chrome).

Once installed, cookies have a determined lifespan, remaining "passive" in the sense that they do not contain software programs, viruses or spyware and will not access information on the hard drive of the user's device on which they have been installed.

A cookie is made up of two parts: the cookie name and the cookie content/value. From a technical perspective, only the web server that sent the cookie can access it again when a user returns to the web page associated with that web server.

s2.title: 2. What purposes are cookies used for on this website?
s2.text:
Cookies are used to provide users of this website with a better browsing experience and services adapted to the needs and interests of each user, as follows:

• Improving the use of this website, including by identifying any errors that occur during visits/use of it by users.

• Providing anonymous statistics about how this website is used by the owner of this website.

• Anticipating potential goods that may be made available to users in the future through this website, depending on the services/products accessed.

Based on feedback sent through cookies regarding how this website is used, we can take measures to make this website more efficient and accessible to users.

s3.title: 3. What is the lifespan of cookies?
s3.text:
The lifespan of cookies can vary depending on the purpose for which it is placed. There are the following categories:

Session cookies — a cookie that is automatically deleted when the user closes their browser.

Persistent/fixed cookies — a cookie that remains stored on the user's device until it reaches a certain expiration date (a few minutes, days or years in the future) or until it is deleted by the user at any time through browser settings.

s4.title: 4. What are third-party cookies?
s4.text:
Certain sections of content on this website may be provided by third parties, i.e. not by the website owner, in which case these cookies are called third-party cookies.

These cookies may come from the following third parties:

• Google Analytics

• Facebook Pixel

s5.title: 5. What cookies are used on this website?
s5.text:
When using/visiting this website, the following cookies may be placed:

a. Performance cookies — Through this type of cookie, user preferences on this website are stored, so that resetting preferences in case of subsequent visits to the website is no longer necessary.

b. User analysis cookies — These cookies inform us whether a particular user of this website has visited/used this website before. These cookies are used for statistical purposes only.

c. Geotargeting cookies — These cookies are used by software that determines the country of origin of the website user. The same ads will be received regardless of the language selected.

d. Registration cookies — When you register on this site, cookies are generated that remember this fact. Servers use these cookies to show us the account you are registered with.

e. Advertising cookies — These cookies allow us to find out that a user has viewed an online advertisement, the type of it and the time elapsed since viewing that advertising message. These cookies are used for online advertising targeting and are anonymous.

f. Advertising provider cookies — From third-party advertising providers.

s6.title: 6. What type of information is stored and accessed through cookies?
s6.text: Cookies store information in a small text file that allows browser recognition. This website recognizes the browser until the cookies expire or are deleted.

s7.title: 7. How can cookies be disabled?
s7.text:
Disabling and refusing to accept cookies can make this website difficult to visit, resulting in limitations on its use.

Users can configure their browser to reject cookie files or to accept cookies from a specific website only. However, refusing or disabling cookies does not mean you will not receive online advertising — only that it will not be adapted to your preferences and interests.

All modern browsers offer the ability to change cookie settings. These settings can typically be accessed in the "options" section or in your browser's "preferences" menu.

For any additional questions about how cookies are used on this website, please contact us at viilamunte@gmail.com.

Types of cookies used:

1. Necessary for website operation — This website uses cookies to save user sessions and for activities strictly necessary for its operation.

2. Analytics (Google Analytics) — Monitors website use to create reports and helps us improve user experience.

3. Marketing and behavior analysis (Facebook) — A behavioral remarketing service that analyzes visitors to this website. Processing Location: USA.

4. Displaying content from other platforms (YouTube, Vimeo) — Allows loading external content directly on the website. Processing Location: USA.
